productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men Grey Melange Briefs
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of briefs embody these very ideals. Its stylish waistband and pure cotton composition give you a body enhancing fit.     Product DetailsGrey melange Y-front briefs, elasticized black waistband with branding, convenient front-fly opening with red binding,   high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort, bio-washed to soften the fabric and avoid skin irritationMaterial and Care100% cotton  Machine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitComfit, Regular  RiseThe model (height 6'and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
